trees.name: Scale AM Optimisation
trees.desired_outcome: Free AMs from manual work so they can focus on relationships and growth
trees.key_result: Remove 10 hrs/month of manual AM work per venue

branches.name: Bulk deal tooling
branches.description: AMs managing deals across venues manually

branches.name: Onboarding automation
branches.description: Manual steps in new venue onboarding AMs currently own

branches.description: AMs manually identifying at-risk or opportunity venues

branches.name: Opportunity surfaces
branches.description: AMs not knowing which venues to prioritise or act on

branches.name: Deal Brain recommendations
branches.description: AMs manually configuring deals that could be system-recommended

branches.name: Early warning system
branches.description: AMs reacting to churn after signals were already visible

trees.name: Drive Deal Performance Through System-Led Actions
trees.desired_outcome: Increase venue revenue via scalable system-driven optimisation in Partner Portal
trees.key_result: Increase % of venues actively engaging in revenue-driving actions within Partner Portal

branches.name: NCI activation
branches.description: Venues not activating or understanding New Customer Incentive

branches.name: Smarter defaults
branches.description: Venues launching with suboptimal deal settings

branches.name: Marketing packs

branches.name: Deal upgrade prompts
